positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic, roaring golden lion head framed by swirling geometric smoke and subtle celestial constellations. The lion's mane should have sharp, clean edges and exaggerated, powerful musculature. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant gold, and stark white for maximum contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a circular crop or chest print. Intricate line work, neo-tribal art style, vector illustration quality, clean silhouette, strong dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, highly detailed, high contrast, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, noisy, ugly, bad anatomy, low quality, extra limbs, messy background, photorealism, grayscale, logo, trademark
